nodes.name: Appert's tetraka
nodes.summary: Appert's tetraka（Appert's tetraka，学名 Xanthomixis (bird) apperti），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The species is considered vulnerable due to its restricted range, particularly to habitat loss due to forest clearance

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: At present the Zombitse-Vohibasia forest is the subject of conservation projects that have stopped deforestation, and the Analavelona Classified Forest, while not protected, is remote and not under immediate threat
